description: Cabinet pulls, knobs, and handles chosen for finish durability, ergonomics, and fit.

attributes.label: Center-to-Center
attributes.explanation: Hole spacing must match existing cabinet drilling.

attributes.label: Overall Length
attributes.explanation: Overall length affects grip comfort and visual scale.

attributes.label: Material
attributes.explanation: Solid brass and stainless generally outlast zinc in wet zones.

attributes.label: Finish
attributes.explanation: PVD and quality powder coatings resist wear and corrosion better.

attributes.label: Warranty
attributes.explanation: Lifetime finish warranties are common for premium lines.

watch_out_factors.title: Hole Pattern Mismatch
watch_out_factors.description: Even small spacing differences can make existing doors unusable.

watch_out_factors.title: Finish Inconsistency
watch_out_factors.description: Match all pieces from one line to avoid color variance.

buyer_guide_key_points: Confirm metric spacing before ordering bulk packs.
Order one sample first to validate comfort and scale.
contractor_questions: Can we reuse existing holes or need redrill/refinish?
Will long pulls interfere with adjacent appliance doors?
Do we need longer screws for thicker drawer fronts?
